title: claude-mem MCP Server Configuration
description: Configuration for the claude-mem MCP server, which provides a persistent hybrid memory store using SQLite (structured metadata) and ChromaDB (vector embeddings for semantic search). Communicates via stdio transport on port 37777.

sqlite.description: SQLite database for structured memory metadata: IDs, timestamps, categories, tags.

chroma.description: ChromaDB vector store for semantic embedding of memory content, used for similarity search.

tools.name: search_memory
tools.description: Perform a semantic similarity search over stored memories using a natural language query.

query.description: A natural language query to search for semantically similar memories.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

threshold.description: Minimum cosine similarity score (0.0–1.0) for inclusion in results.

tools.name: save_memory
tools.description: Persist a piece of information to the memory store with optional tags and category.

content.description: The text content of the memory to store.

tools.name: get_memory_timeline
tools.description: Retrieve memories in chronological order within an optional date range and category filter.

category.description: Optional category to restrict the timeline.

tools.name: delete_memory
tools.description: Permanently delete a specific memory entry by its unique ID.

id.description: The unique identifier of the memory entry to delete.

tools.name: clear_memory
tools.description: Delete all memories or all memories in a specific category.

category.description: Optional category name. If omitted, ALL memories are deleted.
